results.rendered_html:
ānāyya a. To be brought near.
— yyaḥ [ānī-ṇyat āyādeśaḥ  P. III. 1. 127 ] Consecrated fire taken from gārhapatya or household fire and placed on the south side (also called dākṣiṇāgni); dakṣiṇāgniviśeṣa evedaṃ sa hi gārhapatyādānīyate anityaśca satatamaprajvalanāt  Sk.
